infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Penncrest Theater uses the camera to scan ticket QR codes at venue entry.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Penncrest Theater uses your location so Stripe Terminal can connect to supported in-person payment readers.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Penncrest Theater uses Bluetooth to connect to supported Stripe Terminal readers when needed.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Penncrest Theater uses Bluetooth to connect to supported Stripe Terminal readers when needed.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Penncrest Theater uses the local network to connect to supported Stripe Terminal readers when needed.
